product_name: Regional Studies - eight place-based analytical pages (Africa, Berlin, East Asia, London, Mideast, Mongol, Russia, Western)
what_this_proves: The public static room surface exists and exposes reviewer-readable structure, mechanism/evidence language, and a hash route.
what_this_does_not_prove: It does not prove a stateful application workflow, backend persistence, export behavior, or live user interaction.
next_runtime_evidence_required: Open or run the actual local/web application slice, execute the fixture, and capture input, state, output, export, and acceptance-test evidence.
claim_boundary: May claim browser-surface availability if gates pass. May not claim complete runtime operation until live runtime trace is captured.
